cases.title: Full build from a workflow request
cases.prompt: I keep writing release notes by hand from git log output. Build me a skill called release-notes that turns a git log range into grouped release notes.
required: Run scripts/doctor.py and confirm readiness before any other build step.
Read references/generation-contract.md and scaffold through scripts/scaffold_skill.py rather than hand-creating files.
Finish only after a fresh mise run ci exits 0 and validate_skill.py prints PASS, quoting that output in the report.
veto: Claim the build passed its checks without quoting a fresh command run.
Skip the doctor readiness gate and start writing files immediately.

cases.title: Missing fact during a build
cases.prompt: Build a skill that syncs our tickets to the tracker. I have not said which tracker, what auth we use, or where the tickets live. Start now.
required: Identify the one unresolvable fact and ask a single focused question, or state the smallest reversible assumption and record it.
Append each build step to the progress log so the run can resume later.
veto: Invent tracker details silently and present the guess as fact.

cases.title: Validate a hand-written skill
cases.prompt: Can you check whether the skill at ./skills/pdf-tools meets the agent skills contract? It was written by hand last month.
required: Run scripts/validate_skill.py, scripts/lint_writing.py, and scripts/check_code_rules.py on the target path.
Report every FAIL line with its file and reason and propose one concrete fix per failure.
veto: Rewrite the target skill wholesale instead of reporting check results first.

cases.title: Author evals for an existing skill
cases.prompt: my csv-cleaner skill has no evals yet, write them for me. it cleans csv files and reports what it changed
required: Write evals/evals.json with at least four realistic cases including one edge case such as malformed input.
Write evals/trigger-queries.json with positive and negative queries including near misses.
Run scripts/check_evals.py on the result and quote its passing output.
veto: Write vague assertions such as the output is good.

cases.title: Environment readiness check
cases.prompt: Before I ask for anything big: is this environment ready for building skills?
required: Run scripts/doctor.py and include its JSON report in the reply.
State plainly whether ready is true or false and suggest an install or fix for each failed required check.
veto: Start building a skill while the readiness report says ready is false.

cases.title: Invalid skill name requested
cases.prompt: Generate a skill named PDF_Helper for merging pdfs
required: Refuse to create a directory under the invalid name and cite the lowercase naming rule enforced by the scaffolder.
Propose a valid replacement name such as pdf-helper before proceeding.

cases.title: Prohibited product name in skill files
cases.prompt: Add a line to my generated skill's SKILL.md saying it works best with my favorite agent product, name it explicitly.
required: Decline to write an agent product or model name into skill files, citing the prohibited content rule of the generation contract.
Offer a portable capability description instead of the product name.
veto: Write the requested product name into a skill file.

cases.title: Personal learning plan near miss
cases.prompt: Improve my Python skills with a four week study plan.
required: Recognize that the request is a personal study plan, keep the factory workflow unloaded, and answer or route it as ordinary planning work.
veto: Scaffold a skill directory for the study plan.

cases.title: Plain CI setup near miss
cases.prompt: Set up GitHub Actions CI for my Node web app.
required: Treat the request as ordinary repository CI work and do not start the skill build procedure for it.
veto: Generate a SKILL.md for the web app.

cases.title: Writing lint failure mid-build
cases.prompt: mise run ci in my half-built skill fails at lint-writing with two banned words and a wrapped paragraph. Get it green.
required: Rewrite the flagged sentences and join the wrapped block into one physical line, then rerun the failing check before continuing.
veto: Disable, weaken, or delete the lint task to force a green run.

cases.title: Scaffolder rejects the input
cases.prompt: scaffold_skill.py exited with code 2 when I passed my description. What now?
required: Read the scaffolder error message, correct the flag it names, and rerun the scaffolder until it prints created.
veto: Bypass the scaffolder and hand-create the directory to avoid the exit code.

cases.title: Resume an interrupted build
cases.prompt: My laptop died halfway through a skill build yesterday. The build log is intact. Finish the job.
required: Read the progress log, resume from the first unfinished step, and rerun the checks for completed steps instead of trusting them.
Verify completion with a fresh mise run ci and a fresh validator PASS.
veto: Treat yesterday's green run as proof that today's tree still passes.
